_comment: Template Claude Code project settings aligned with the agents-md standard. Copy to .claude/settings.json in your project root and adjust to taste. The _comment fields are for humans and should be removed.

permissions._comment: Allowed shell commands. Keep this scoped — the agent should never freely run destructive Git or DB commands.

env._comment: Per-project env overrides for the Claude Code session. Don't put secrets here; put them in .env and load via your app.
